name: ancient cave
hints: An ancient cave with primitive drawings on the walls! A stalactite hangs from the roof and there's a dark opening above.
The cave drawings may contain clues. The stalactite and dark opening are both important.
BREA STAL (break stalactite) to get a sharp tool. GO DARK leads up through the roof to the deep cave.
S=beach (16). GO DARK=deep cave (11). N=metal tunnel (9). Break stalactite for a weapon/tool.
notes: Ancient cave with drawings, stalactite, dark opening. S=beach (16). GO DARK=deep cave (11). N=metal tunnel (9). Break stalactite for tool.
